overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior riding a decorated horse through a lush Japanese forest. The journey progresses from wooded trails near abandoned structures, through open meadows, and finally along a river with the horse entering the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail near abandoned wooden structures

events.description: passing the last wooden structure and entering denser forest

agents.ego_description: riding the horse at a steady trot along a narrow forest path, passing abandoned wooden buildings and carts

entered.detail: small weathered wooden structure with sloped roof partially covered in moss
abandoned wooden wagon with broken wheels beside the path
dense forest of tall cedar and pine trees creating canopy overhead
low stone retaining wall along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near abandoned wooden structures in a dense forest. The samurai rides along a narrow dirt trail, passing a wooden shed and cart on the sides. Tall trees create a partial canopy overhead with dappled sunlight filtering through.

events.description: emerging from forest cover into open sunlit meadow
horse crosses a small shallow stream running through the grass

agents.ego_description: cantering through open grassland, crossing a small stream and navigating around rocks

entered.detail: expansive field of tall green grass with scattered yellow wildflowers
narrow shallow creek with clear water cutting through the meadow
large moss-covered boulders scattered throughout the grass

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit meadow with tall grass and wildflowers. The horse crosses a small stream and navigates around rocky outcrops. The forest edge remains visible in the distance while the immediate surroundings are open and exposed to direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail descending toward river with bamboo groves

events.description: re-entering forest canopy and approaching river sounds
first view of the river becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: riding downhill through forest trail, approaching a river with bamboo groves becoming visible

entered.detail: cluster of tall green bamboo stalks lining the right side of the path
wide river with flowing water visible through gaps in the trees ahead
traditional Japanese stone lantern beside the path near the river approach

segments.scene_description: The path descends through dense forest with bamboo groves appearing on the sides. A traditional stone lantern marks the approach to a wide river visible ahead. The lighting becomes more diffused under the forest canopy as the terrain slopes downward toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky banks

events.description: horse enters the shallow river water from the grassy bank
navigating through deeper water along the rocky river edge

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse through shallow river water, splashing along the rocky shoreline

entered.detail: rocky riverbank with smooth stones and boulders along the water edge
distant forested mountains visible across the river valley

segments.scene_description: The horse enters the shallow river, creating splashes as it moves through the water. The scene opens to reveal a wide river valley with distant mountains visible. The path follows the rocky shoreline with the horse moving between water and land along the river's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank transitioning to deeper water

events.description: horse moves from rocky shore into deeper water, swimming slightly

agents.ego_description: riding along the rocky riverbank before guiding the horse into deeper water where it begins to swim

entered.detail: deeper section of the river where the horse must swim rather than walk

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the rocky riverbank before the horse enters deeper water. The terrain transitions from shallow wading to swimming as the water level rises. Forested banks continue on both sides with the river stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai on horseback travels from the sheltered depths of a dense forest into a wide, open river valley. It begins on a narrow dirt trail passing abandoned wooden structures and carts under a canopy of dappled sunlight, before the terrain opens into a bright, sunlit meadow filled with tall grass and wildflowers. As the horse navigates rocky outcrops and crosses a small stream, the scene shifts back into a descending forest path lined with bamboo groves and a traditional stone lantern. The camera then follows the horse as it enters the shallow water of a wide river, creating splashes while revealing a vast valley with distant mountains. Finally, the path tracks along the rocky shoreline before the horse transitions from wading into deeper water, with forested banks stretching into the distance.
